msg.mgr_reinit_sent:
Self-update signal sent (request_id={request_id}).
Manager will: git pull вҶ’ restart all.
Service may be briefly unavailable.

msg.dispatcher_not_running:
Dispatcher not running.

help.text:
Available Commands
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

Menu & Info:
  /menu - Open main menu
  /help - Show commands
  /info - System info
  /ops_whoami - Identity info

Task Management:
  /task [content] - Create task
  /status [code] - View tasks
  /events <code> - Task events
  /accept [code] [OTP] - Accept task
  /reject [code] [OTP] <reason> - Reject task
  /retry [code] [notes] - Retry task
  /cancel [code] - Cancel task
  /clear_tasks - Clear tasks

Backend & Model:
  /switch_backend [backend] - Switch backend
  /switch_model [model] - Switch model
  /set_role_model <role> <model> [provider]
  /set_pipeline <config> - Set pipeline
  /show_pipeline - Show pipeline

Archive:
  /archive [keyword] - Overview/Search
  /archive_show <ID> - Details
  /archive_log <keyword> - Log

Ops (OTP required):
  /mgr_restart <OTP> - Restart
  /mgr_reinit <OTP> - Self update
  /mgr_status - Mgr status
  /ops_restart <OTP> - Restart ops
  /ops_set_workspace <path> <OTP>

Security:
  /auth_init - Init 2FA
  /auth_status - 2FA status
  /auth_debug <OTP> - Debug OTP

Workspace:
  /workspace_add <path> [label]
  /workspace_remove <ID>
  /workspace_list
  /workspace_default <ID>
  /workspace_search_roots
  /dispatch_status
  @workspace:<label> <task>

Other:
  /screenshot [desc] - Screenshot
  Send text - Chat with AI

accept_doc.title: # Task Test & Acceptance Document
accept_doc.table_header: | Case ID | Title | Steps | Expected | Actual | Status |
accept_doc.case_task_testable_steps: Read task text;Verify goal, scope and constraints
accept_doc.case_result_verifiable_steps: Check result JSON;Compare with task goal
accept_doc.case_log_traceable_steps: Check runlog file;Verify command, timing, returncode
accept_doc.case_changes_verifiable_expected: Reasonable changes or task allows no code changes
accept_doc.case_user_accept_steps: Review results, logs, test cases;Execute /accept or /reject
accept_doc.case_user_accept_expected: User gives clear pass or reject
accept_doc.qa_no_audit: QA produced no substantive audit (input truncated, QA only received role setup)

retry.already_accepted: Task already accepted and archived, cannot re-develop
retry.invalid_status: Only rejected or pending acceptance tasks can be re-developed (current: {status})
retry.max_iterations: Max iterations ({max}) reached, please create new task
retry.submitted:
Task [{code}] {task_id} re-submitted (Round {iter})
Status: pending
Enhanced prompt injected
